description_long: This airplane features a sleek, futuristic design with a sharply pointed nose and a highly stylized, angular wing structure. The wings are swept back with pronounced, geometric cutouts and bold yellow and dark purple coloration, giving it a striking visual presence. The fuselage is streamlined, with a low-profile canopy cockpit situated near the front, blending smoothly into the body. At the rear, a single engine nozzle is visible, suggesting a jet propulsion system, and the tail section is integrated into the overall wing structure without a distinct vertical stabilizer. The surface appears glossy and metallic, with smooth, reflective finishes and minimal visible seams or rivets. No landing gear is visible, and the overall form suggests a high-speed, possibly advanced or conceptual aircraft.
description: A sleek, futuristic airplane with swept, angular wings and a pointed nose, finished in glossy yellow and dark purple. The design features a low-profile cockpit and integrated rear jet engine.
description_view_0: Side view highlighting the sharply pointed nose, low-profile cockpit, and the dramatic sweep and cutouts of the wings.
description_view_1: Angled view showing the elongated fuselage, the integration of the wings with the body, and the smooth, continuous surface finish.
description_view_2: Rear three-quarter view emphasizing the single jet engine nozzle, the angular tail integration, and the geometric wing cutouts.
description_view_3: Rear view displaying the engine exhaust, the full span of the swept wings, and the absence of a distinct vertical stabilizer.
attribute_wingspan_configuration: Low-wing configuration with highly swept, angular wings featuring geometric cutouts and no visible winglets or dihedral/anhedral angles.
attribute_tail_design: Integrated tail with no distinct vertical stabilizer, forming a blended wing-body layout.
attribute_cockpit_placement: Forward-mounted, enclosed single-seat cockpit with a low-profile canopy
